biteOfDay: Table Rock walleye are on fire — 40+ fish days on gravel points. Taneycomo trout biting early before generation kicks in; pink worms and nightcrawlers top producers.

taneycomo.generation: Off until ~9 AM, then ramps to ~12,800 cfs holding through evening

species.name: Bass
species.technique: Topwater at dawn, deep crankbaits, football jigs on offshore structure

species.name: Crappie
species.technique: Brush piles and submerged timber in creek arms, live minnows or tube jigs

species.name: Walleye
species.technique: Crankbaits and live bait on gravel points — hottest bite on the lake

species.name: Trout
species.technique: Pink worm under float, nightcrawlers, scuds, zebra midges (fly); PowerBait, small spoons (spin)

species.name: Bluegill
species.technique: Worms, small poppers — fantastic for kids and family fun

tip: Fish early mornings. Table Rock topwater at sunrise. Taneycomo no-generation window until ~9 AM — pink worm under a float is the top producer. After generation kicks on, drift nightcrawlers. Stay hydrated (heat index 93°F+).
